title: Dolls
intro: Dolls are passive companions that permanently boost your character's stats once registered. Each activated Doll has its own stats — the more you activate, the stronger your character becomes. Dolls also have their own levels, further increasing their benefit as you invest in them.

figure.alt: Dolls collection UI showing all grades and active stat bonuses
figure.caption: The Dolls UI — each registered Doll adds permanent stat bonuses to your character.

obtaining.title: How to Obtain Dolls
steps: Kill **Normal Raid Bosses** — they drop Normal Tarot Cards.
Open the Community Board (`Alt+B`) → **Tarot Cards** and open your Normal card packs. Bulk opening (x1, x5, x25, x250) is available.
Doll pieces appear directly in your **inventory** after opening the cards.
Open the Community Board (`Alt+B`) → **Dolls** and register your doll pieces to activate them.

grades.title: Doll Grades
grades.preText: There are **5 grades** of Dolls, progressing from the most basic to the most powerful. Higher grades require rarer Tarot Card pieces but provide significantly stronger permanent stats:

leveling.title: Unlocking & Leveling
steps: **Unlock the Doll first** — register the required pieces to activate the Doll slot.
**Level up 10 times** — each Doll can be leveled from 1 to 10 after unlocking.
Each level requires **more Doll pieces** and **more Gold Bars (GB)** than the previous.
Each level increases the Doll's permanent stat contribution to your character.

upgradeFigure.alt: A-grade Doll at Level 10 showing max stats
upgradeFigure.caption: An A-grade Doll at maximum level — showing the substantial stat bonuses a fully leveled Doll provides.

infoBoxes.label: Stack Your Dolls
infoBoxes.body: Each *activated* Doll adds its stats independently — registering more Dolls stacks the bonuses. Focus on unlocking as many slots as possible before pushing individual Doll levels too high.

infoBoxes.label: Related System
infoBoxes.body: **Relics** follow the same principle but use pieces from **Hard boss Tarot Cards** and are considerably more powerful. See the Relics section for details.
